name: codercoco-custom-plugin-marketplace
description: A community marketplace of Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: issue-flow
plugins.description: Manage the full GitHub issue lifecycle — from picking up an issue through branch setup, implementation, and raising a PR. Includes /swarm (agent-driven) and /swarm-exec (harness-driven) agentic flows.

plugins.name: mission
plugins.description: End-to-end GitHub issue orchestrator — plan, build, review, open PR, handle comments. Resumable state machine. Space / mission control themed.
